predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag, 
    AVG(fhp.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS average_monthly_consumption_per_capita, 
    COUNT(fhc.household_id) AS total_household_count
FROM 
    fact_household_poverty_metrics fhp
JOIN 
    fact_household_composition fhc ON fhp.household_id = fhc.household_id
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id
WHERE 
    fhp.below_poverty_line_indicator = 'No'
GROUP BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag
ORDER BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag, 
    AVG(fhp.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS average_monthly_consumption_per_capita, 
    COUNT(fhc.household_id) AS total_household_count
FROM 
    fact_household_poverty_metrics fhp
JOIN 
    fact_household_composition fhc ON fhp.household_id = fhc.household_id
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id
WHERE 
    fhp.below_poverty_line_indicator = 'No'
GROUP BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag
ORDER BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag;

WHERE T1.state ILIKE 'Rajasthan' AND T3.household_assets_index = 21 
AND T3.caste_religion_group_8_category NOT ILIKE 'Dalit';

gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T2 ON T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 ORDER BY AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag, 
    AVG(fhp.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS avg_monthly_consumption, 
    AVG(fhc.household_member_count) AS avg_household_size
FROM 
    fact_household_poverty_metrics fhp
JOIN 
    fact_household_composition fhc ON fhp.household_id = fhc.household_id
JOIN 
    dim_geography dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id
WHERE 
    fhp.below_poverty_line_indicator = 'No'
GROUP BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag
ORDER BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.census_2001_urban_rural_flag;
